metadata.description: Idomoo Claude Code plugins — AI video generation via the Idomoo / Lucas API. Pick the CLI plugin if you have the idomoo binary installed locally, or the MCP plugin to use Idomoo's hosted Lucas MCP server (no local install).

plugins.name: idomoo
plugins.description: AI video generation via the local idomoo CLI. Teaches Claude the brand → brief → blueprint → video workflow end-to-end.

plugins.name: idomoo-mcp
plugins.description: Hosted Lucas MCP integration — auto-registers https://lucas-mcp.idomoo.ai/mcp and ships the matching interactive-flow skill. Set LUCAS_MCP_KEY in your environment.
